query: List the five 1 km grid cells in Lillestrøm municipality with the highest number of parcels located in quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by parcel count descending.

1.description: Get Lillestrøm municipality kommunenummer and bounding box (minx,miny,maxx,maxy)

2.description: Get quick-clay mapping polygons reduced to the municipality bbox (will use bbox numeric values from step 1)

3.description: Get parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm with point geometry (representasjonspunkt) filtered by kommunenummer from step 1

4.description: Find parcel points that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels in quick-clay)

5.description: Get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality bbox (will use bbox numeric values from step 1)

6.description: Join grid cells with parcels-in-quickclay to get grid-parcel pairs

7.description: Count distinct parcels per grid cell (parcel_count)

8.description: Sort grid cells by parcel_count descending and grid id ascending as tie-breaker

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

final.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;
